author: gb9t
content:
**Phase B advance: block/ tier complete.**

.design/block/00-overview.md (244 lines, 13 REQ / 13 AC, 0 open).

Coverage: 6/14 in-scope subsystems with Tier-2 drafts (arch + arch/x86, lib, mm, kernel, fs, block).

11 Tier-3 docs spawned: blk-mq, request-queue, bio, block-ioctl, partitions, io-schedulers, cgroup-throttle, blk-crypto, bio-integrity, zoned, sed-opal.

Compat slice owned by block/:
- BLK* ioctl numbers + semantics (BLKROSET, BLKGETSIZE64, BLKDISCARD, BLKZEROOUT, BLKSECDISCARD, BLKPG, BLKRRPART, BLKZN* zoned-mgmt, BLKTRACE* tracing setup, SED_* Opal commands)
- /sys/block/<dev>/queue/{scheduler,nr_requests,read_ahead_kb,max_sectors_kb,rotational,zoned,nr_zones,zone_*}, /sys/block/<dev>/{size,ro,removable}, partition entries
- /sys/fs/cgroup/<grp>/io.{stat,max,latency,weight,prio.class}
- /proc/{diskstats,partitions}
- Partition-table byte-identical parses (MBR, GPT, Mac, Amiga RDB, Atari, IBM/s390 DASD, LDM/Windows-dynamic, more)
- T10-PI 8-byte field generation + verify
- Inline Encryption Engine wrapped-key descriptors
- Opal command frames

Verification:
- Layer 2: 5 TLA+ models (blk_mq_tag_alloc, request_state_machine, blkcg_accounting, bio_integrity_chain, elevator)
- Layer 3: 4 mandatory invariant harnesses (tag bitmap exclusivity, request list non-duplication, bio chain acyclicity+length, blkcg hierarchical accounting)
- Layer 4 opt-ins: partition parsers (Creusot — file-format parsing), T10-PI CRC (Verus — deterministic spec), IEE key derivation (Verus)

Note:  was removed in baseline 7.1 — elevator.c is the implementation file with no separate header. Frontmatter corrected.

All other upstream paths verified.

Pending Phase B: net/ (large), ipc/ (small), crypto/ (medium), security/ (medium), init/ (small), io_uring/ (medium), virt/ (medium - KVM core), drivers/ (huge but mostly delegated), sound/ (medium - lower priority for v0).
